title: UAP Disclosure Status: 90-Day Review Deadline Approaches
detail: As the 90-day deadline from Trump's February 19 UAP disclosure executive order approaches (May 20, 2026), multiple developments are unfolding. The Pentagon's review of classified UAP programs is reportedly ongoing but behind schedule. Congressional UAP advocates continue to push for full implementation of existing disclosure laws. AARO's latest annual report is overdue. Meanwhile, the ongoing Iran conflict has diverted significant public and congressional attention from UAP matters. Advocacy groups warn that the executive order's impact depends entirely on good-faith implementation by defense and intelligence agencies, some of whom have historically resisted UAP transparency.
